label: 936c Refinancing and prepayment of FFB loans

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A borrower of a loan made by the Federal Financing Bank and guaranteed under may, at the option of the borrower, refinance or prepay the loan or an advance on the loan, or any portion of the loan or advance.section 936 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the difference between the outstanding principal balance of the loan being refinanced and the present value of the loan discounted at a rate equal to the then current cost of funds to the Department of the Treasury for obligations of comparable maturity to the loan being refinanced or prepaid;

children.label: i
children.text: the number of quarterly payment dates between the date of the refinancing or prepayment and the maturity date for the loan advance; bears to

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of quarterly payment dates between the first quarterly payment date that occurs 12 years after the end of the year in which the amount being refinanced was advanced and the maturity date of the loan advance; and

children.label: i
children.text: the present value of 100 percent of the amount of interest for 1 year on the outstanding principal balance of the loan or loan advance, or any portion of the loan or advance, being refinanced or prepaid; plus

children.label: I
children.text: each payment scheduled for the interval on the loan amount being refinanced or prepaid; and

children.label: II
children.text: the payment amounts that would be required during the interval on the amounts being refinanced or prepaid if the interest rate on the loan were equal to the then current cost of funds to the Department of the Treasury for obligations of comparable maturity to the loan being refinanced or prepaid.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the penalty provided by paragraph (1)(A) shall be required for refinancing or prepayment under this section.

children.label: i
children.text: paragraph (1)(B), if the loan advance has reached the 12-year maturity required under the loan agreement for the refinancing or prepayment; or

children.label: ii
children.text: paragraph (1)(C), if the loan advance has not reached the 12-year maturity required under the loan agreement for the refinancing or prepayment.

children.label: i
children.text: making a payment in the amount of the required penalty at the time of the refinancing; or

children.label: ii
children.text: increasing the outstanding principal balance of the loan advance guaranteed by the Secretary that is being refinanced under this section by the amount of the penalty.

children.heading: Increased principal
children.label: B Increased principal
children.text: If a borrower meets the penalty requirements of paragraph (1) by increasing the outstanding principal balance of the loan advance that is being refinanced, the borrower shall make a payment at the time of the refinancing equal to 2.5 percent of the amount of the penalty that is added to the outstanding principal balance of the loan.

children.heading: Loan terms and conditions after refinancing
children.label: c Loan terms and conditions after refinancing

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: On the payment of a penalty as provided by subsection (b), the loan or loan advance, or any portion of the loan or advance, shall be refinanced at the interest rate described in paragraph (2) for a term selected by the borrower pursuant to paragraph (3), except that this paragraph shall not apply if the loan advance, or any portion of the advance, is prepaid by the borrower.

children.heading: Interest rate
children.label: 2 Interest rate
children.text: The interest rate on a loan refinanced under this section shall be determined to be equal to the then current cost of funds to the Department of the Treasury for obligations of comparable maturity to a term selected by the borrower pursuant to paragraph (3), except that such rate shall not be greater than 7 percent per year, subject to subsection (d).

children.label: A
children.text: shall select the term for which an interest rate shall be determined pursuant to paragraph (2); and

children.label: B
children.text: at the end of the term (and any succeeding term selected by the borrower under this paragraph), may renew the loan for another term selected by the borrower.

children.heading: Maximum term
children.label: 4 Maximum term
children.text: The borrower may not select a term pursuant to paragraph (3) that ends after the maturity date set for the loan before the refinancing of the loan under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: the refinancing and inclusion of the penalty shall not be subject to appropriations or limited by the amount provided during a fiscal year for new loans, loan guarantees, or other credit activity;

children.label: B
children.text: the request of the borrower for the refinancing under this section may not be denied or delayed; and

children.label: C
children.text: the borrower may not be limited in the selection of any refinancing or prepayment option provided by this section to the borrower.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraphs (2), (3), and (4), a borrower of a loan or loan advance, or any portion of the loan or advance, that is refinanced under this section shall have the option of ensuring that the interest rate on such loan, loan advance, or portion thereof does not exceed 7 percent per year.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: A borrower may not exercise the option under paragraph (1) in the case of a loan or loan advance, or portion thereof, if the total amount of such loans for which such option would be exercised exceeds 50 percent of the outstanding principal balance of the loans made to such borrower and guaranteed under .section 936 of this title

children.heading: Fee
children.label: 3 Fee
children.text: A borrower that exercises the maximum rate option under paragraph (1) shall, at the time of exercising such option, pay a fee equal to 1 percent of the outstanding principal balance of such loan or loan advance, or portion thereof, for which such option is exercised. Such fee shall be in addition to the penalties and other payments required under subsection (b).

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: 4 Sunset
children.text: The option provided under paragraph (1) shall not be available in the case of any loan or loan advance, or portion thereof, unless a written request to exercise such option is sent to the Secretary not later than 1 year after the effective date of regulations issued to carry out the Rural Electrification Loan Restructuring Act of 1993.
